CustomMetadata.label: CAI-006 - Connected App refresh tokens never expire

values.value: Connected App refresh tokens never expire
A Connected App has RefreshTokenValidityPeriod set to 0 (unlimited). Refresh tokens issued by this app never expire and can be used indefinitely to obtain new access tokens.
A stolen refresh token provides indefinite access to the Connected App. Unlike access tokens, refresh tokens are long-lived and are not visible in login history, making abuse hard to detect.
Set RefreshTokenValidityPeriod to 90 days or less on the Connected App OAuth policies. Revoke all existing refresh tokens after setting the policy.
